knowledgeBases.title: Knowledge Bases
knowledgeBases.description: Manage knowledge bases and documents for RAG
knowledgeBases.name: Name
knowledgeBases.teamHint: The team that owns this knowledge base
knowledgeBases.embeddingModelHint: Model used for generating document embeddings
knowledgeBases.embeddingModelCannotChange: Embedding model cannot be changed after creation
knowledgeBases.enableKbHint: Disabled knowledge bases cannot be queried
knowledgeBases.documentsDescription: Manage documents in this knowledge base
knowledgeBases.createKbHint: Click the button above to create your first knowledge base
knowledgeBases.deleteKbConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete knowledge base "{name}"? This will also delete all documents and chunks. This action cannot be undone.
knowledgeBases.confirmBulkDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected knowledge bases? This action cannot be undone.
knowledgeBases.uploadDocumentDescription: Upload documents to the knowledge base
knowledgeBases.importUrlDescription: Import content from a web page or YouTube video
knowledgeBases.urlHint: Supports web pages and YouTube videos
knowledgeBases.dragDropHint: Drag and drop files here, or click to select
knowledgeBases.uploadDocumentHint: Upload documents to start building your knowledge base
knowledgeBases.deleteDocumentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete document "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
knowledgeBases.confirmBulkDocumentsDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected documents? This action cannot be undone.
knowledgeBases.deleteChunkConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this chunk? This action cannot be undone.
knowledgeBases.separatorHint: Leave empty to use default separators
knowledgeBases.cleanTextHint: Remove excess whitespace, normalize line breaks. Disable to preserve original formatting
knowledgeBases.rechunkWarningTitle: Warning: Re-chunking will replace all existing chunks
knowledgeBases.rechunkWarningDescription: All existing chunks and their embeddings will be deleted and regenerated. Any manual edits to chunks will be lost.
knowledgeBases.processHint: Configure chunk settings before processing. Processing will split the document into chunks and generate embeddings.
knowledgeBases.documentPendingDescription: This document is waiting to be processed. Configure the chunk settings on the right and click "Start Processing" to begin.
knowledgeBases.documentProcessingDescription: The document is being processed. This page will automatically update when processing is complete.
knowledgeBases.documentFailedDescription: An error occurred while processing this document. You can try reprocessing it.
knowledgeBases.settingsReadOnly: Chunk settings are read-only for processed documents. Use "Reprocess" to apply new settings.
knowledgeBases.batchProcessDescription: Configure unified chunk settings for {count} documents
knowledgeBases.clickPreviewHint: Click "Preview Chunks" to see chunking results
knowledgeBases.batchProcessHint: Settings will apply to all pending documents. Preview first to see chunk results.
knowledgeBases.searchTestDescription: Enter a query below to search for relevant document chunks
knowledgeBases.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your query or lowering the similarity threshold
knowledgeBases.topKHint: Maximum number of results to return
